title: ¡Vuelven los García!
writer: Carlos González Dueñas, Rogelio A. González, Carlos Orellana
actors: Sara García, Pedro Infante, Abel Salazar
plot: Luis Antonio, Jose Luis and Luis Manuel are back and seemingly at ease with each other. However, destiny still has something in store for them: the spawn of one of the evil Lopez, siblings Leon and Juan Simon, are looking for veng...
